content.Text: I have the style baseline now. Next I’m locating `RSSStory` and any reading-history helpers so the coach’s APIs and heuristics align with the existing model names instead of inventing incompatible fields.

I haven’t found an `RSSStory` declaration yet. I’m searching by likely property names now so I can either target the real type or, if it’s only available in the app target, keep the new file’s assumptions conservative and compile-safe.
